title: feat: integrate new items API
body:
## Overview

Consume the new `POST /api/items` endpoint.

## Expected Behavior

maestro posts items when state changes.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] POST /api/items called on state transitions
- [ ] Response parsed into ItemResponse struct

## Files to Modify

- src/api/client.rs

## Test Hints

Use wiremock for the HTTP layer.

## Blocked By

- None

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Tests pass
